$PY -m py_compile ".claude/skills/mineru-parse/scripts/mineru_parse.py" && echo "mineru OK"

# 模拟 mineru 新输出结构
echo -e "---\\ntitle: 全文·mytest\\nsource_pdf: 00-收件箱/mytest.pdf\\ntype: fulltext\\nextracted_by: mineru\\nextracted_date: 2026-07-02\\nextraction_quality: unverified\\n---\\n\\n# Title\\n\\n![图 1]\(images/fig1.png\) text\\n![图 2]\(images/fig2.png\)" > "$testroot/00-收件箱/PDF解析/mytest/mytest.md"
mkdir -p "$testroot/00-收件箱/PDF解析/mytest/images"

echo "img2" > "$testroot/00-收件箱/PDF解析/mytest/images/fig2.png"
echo "pdfcontent" > "$testroot/00-收件箱/mytest.pdf"

$PY .claude/skills/llm-wiki-ingest/scripts/finalize_ingest.py \\
  --stem mytest --category "03-行业报告" --name "20260702-My测试文档" --title "My测试文档" --quality good --vault-root "$testroot"

echo; echo "=== 归档结构 ==="; find "$testroot/10-原始资料/99-PDF原件" -maxdepth 4 -type f | sort
echo; echo "=== md 内容（应含相对 images/ 引用和原始资料索引）==="; cat "$testroot/10-原始资料/99-PDF原件/03-行业报告/20260702-My测试文档/20260702-My测试文档.md"
rm -rf "$testroot")

Bash(cd "E:/wiki/nongbaoyun"
md="10-原始资料/99-PDF原件/03-行业报告/20260702-2024年农业保险市场发展综述/20260702-2024年农业保险市场发展综述.md"
# 把 ![[99-PDF原件/03-行业报告/.../images/x.jpg]] 改为 ![图 N]\(images/x.jpg\)
# 先读内容，按行处理保留图注数字
$PY=".claude/skills/mineru-parse/.venv/Scripts/python.exe"
$PY - <<PY
import re
from pathlib import Path
md = Path\("$md"\)
text = md.read_text\(encoding="utf-8"\)
# Pattern: ![[99-PDF原件/03-行业报告/20260702-.../images/FILENAME]]
pat = re.compile\(r'!\\[\\[99-PDF原件/03-行业报告/20260702-2024年农业保险市场发展综述/images/\([^\\]]+\)\\]\\]'\)
# Replace with ![图 N]\(images/FILENAME\) — caption number will be added by order if needed, but original had captions
# Actually the original md had "![图 N]\(token.images/...\)" before migration; after migration it became "![[...]]" with no alt text.
# We can keep the figure number by counting occurrences.
count = [0]
def repl\(m\):
    count[0] += 1
    return f"![图 {count[0]}]\(images/{m.group\(1\)}\)"
text = pat.sub\(repl, text\)
md.write_text\(text, encoding="utf-8"\)
print\("replaced", count[0], "image refs"\)
PY

echo "=== 更新后图片引用 ==="; grep -n "!\\[" "$md" | head)

Bash(cd "E:/wiki/nongbaoyun"

import re
from pathlib import Path
md = Path\("$mdpath"\)

count = [0]
def repl\(m\):
    count[0] += 1
    return f"![图 {count[0]}]\(images/{m.group\(1\)}\)"
text = pat.sub\(repl, text\)
md.write_text\(text, encoding="utf-8"\)
print\("replaced", count[0], "image refs"\)
PY

echo "=== 更新后图片引用 ==="; grep -n "!\\[" "$mdpath" | head)
